allow: Bash(wsl -e bash -c "source ~/.zshrc 2>/dev/null; source ~/.bashrc 2>/dev/null; export PATH=""$HOME/.local/share/pnpm:$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/*/bin:$PATH""; which pnpm; pnpm --version")
Bash(wsl -e zsh -ic "cd ~/projects/koool-claude && pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add input label card dialog separator sonner --yes")
Bash(wsl -e zsh -ic "cd ~/projects/koool-claude && pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add dialog --yes --overwrite")
Bash(wsl -e zsh -ic "cd ~/projects/koool-claude && node -e ""const z = require\(''zod''\); console.log\(z.version || ''no version prop''\)""")
Bash(wsl -e zsh -ic "cd ~/projects/koool-claude && cat node_modules/zod/package.json | grep version | head -3")
Bash(wsl -e zsh -ic "cd ~/projects/koool-claude && cat node_modules/@hookform/resolvers/package.json | grep version | head -1")

Bash(wsl -e zsh -ic "cd ~/projects/koool-claude && node -e ""const rr = require\(''react-router-dom''\); console.log\(Object.keys\(rr\).filter\(k => [''BrowserRouter'',''Routes'',''Route'',''Navigate'',''useNavigate'',''useSearchParams'',''Outlet''].includes\(k\)\).join\('', ''\)\)""")

Bash(wsl -e zsh -ic "cd ~/projects/koool-claude && psql postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:54322/postgres -c ""SELECT key, value FROM auth.config WHERE key IN \(''GOTRUE_SITE_URL'', ''GOTRUE_URI_ALLOW_LIST'', ''GOTRUE_MAILER_URLPATHS_CONFIRMATION'', ''GOTRUE_MAILER_URLPATHS_EMAIL_CHANGE''\);""")
Bash(wsl -e zsh -ic "cd ~/projects/koool-claude && psql postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:54322/postgres -c ""SELECT key, value FROM auth.config LIMIT 20;""")
Bash(wsl -e zsh -ic "cd ~/projects/koool-claude && docker exec -i supabase_db_koool-claude psql -U postgres -c ""SELECT raw_app_meta_data FROM auth.users LIMIT 1;""")
Bash(wsl -e zsh -ic "cd ~/projects/koool-claude && docker exec -i supabase_auth_koool-claude env | grep -i ''SITE_URL\\|URI_ALLOW\\|REDIRECT''")

Bash(wsl -e zsh -ic "cd ~/projects/koool-claude && git add   supabase/migrations/0001_initial_schema.sql   src/lib/supabase.ts   src/types/index.ts   src/stores/auth-store.ts   src/pages/AuthPage.tsx   src/pages/AuthCallback.tsx   src/pages/LandingPage.tsx   src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx   src/components/DisplayNameModal.tsx   src/components/ProtectedRoute.tsx   src/components/ui/card.tsx   src/components/ui/dialog.tsx   src/components/ui/input.tsx   src/components/ui/label.tsx   src/components/ui/separator.tsx   src/components/ui/sonner.tsx   src/App.tsx   src/App.css   supabase/config.toml   tsconfig.app.json   package.json   pnpm-lock.yaml   .env.example")
Bash(wsl -e zsh -ic "cd ~/projects/koool-claude && git push -u origin main")
